title: New resources for Databricks Apps
body: You can now add other Databricks apps and Unity Catalog tables as resources for your Databricks app. App resources enable app-to-app communication, and table resources provide governed access to structured data. See [Add a Databricks app resource to a Databricks app](/aws/en/dev-tools/databricks-apps/apps-resource) and [Add a Unity Catalog table resource to a Databricks app](/aws/en/dev-tools/databricks-apps/tables).

ref_links.text: Add a Databricks app resource to a Databricks app
Add a Unity Catalog table resource to a Databricks app
